g.title: HTTP JSON + multipart/form-data /api/v1/data/* session_id cookie · X-Tab-Id React frontend
backend/main.py CORS · global exception handler router mounting · app state upload_root_dir · session store
backend/routers/*.py connection · query · metadata request/response validation Pydantic models in / out
backend/dependencies.py ConnectionStateManager session_id : tab_id isolation get_active_connector() get_connection_details() per-request FastAPI injection in-memory session store
backend/services/*.py ConnectionService QueryService + builders Validation · Cardinality check TableMerge · ResultBuilder multipart file lifecycle spec-driven connector routing
models/* · exceptions.py ConnectionDetails QueryDescription AppException hierarchy HTTP status code mapping shared between routers + services Pydantic base models + validators
query_service + query_components/ select · filter · group · order sampling · limits dialect-aware SQL output via connector.sql_dialect returns SQL string to Service
services/optimization/* strategy planner + estimators rounding · binning · dedup ClickHouse / DuckDB estimators result-size aware decisions cardinality estimation via connector
connectors/registry.py lookup + validation by type string ConnectorSpec + Capabilities build_connect_args hook build_multipart_connect_args hook supports_incremental_file_add flag
